title: PVP Bots
description: Adds PVP Bots in your game | Inspired by "PVB infinite World" by Hi errs.
body:
## Welcome to "PVP Bots", a mod that adds PVP Bots in your game.                                                                                                                              
###             
### Look on the Pictures for full review                                                             

On the newest Version 1.0.1 it adds 8 different Bots:                                                                                          

- NoobBot:                                                                                         
  Mechanic: noob Player                                                                                              
  Hits slower,                                                                                                   

- ProPlayerXD:                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  Mechanic: Skilled Player                                                                                     
  Can wear Armor,                                                                                            
  has faster attack speed                                                                                      

- 1010101010101010                                                                                              
  Mechanic: Cheater                                                                                      
  Has longer melee range,                                                                                        
  Gives strong knockback,
  Can see other Players over 200 Blocks (based on Render Distance)                                               

- PracticeBot                                                                                                  
  Mechanic: Practice                                                                                         
  Has 10.000 HP,                                                                                         
  Made specific for Practice                                                                               

- YellowBot                                                                                                 
  Mechanic: Practice                                                                                              
  Has 10.000 HP,                                                                                             
  Doesn't move,                                                                                              
  Made specific for Practice                                                                                                        

- Dream                                                                                                    
  Mechanic: Skilled Player                                                                                   
  Places water if it burning,                                                                                 
  can sometimes place dirt,                                                                                        
  can break sometimes diamond_ore                                                                                      

- Camman18                                                                                                       
  Mechanic: Parkour Pro                                                                                         

- ManhuntBot                                                                                                    
  Mechanic: Hunter                                                                                           
  it can respawn,                                                                                                   
  can place water if it burns,                                                                                     
  can break Cobblestone,                                                                                                
  can place dirt,                                                                                                
  if his health is low then its eating bread,                                                                    
  can seeing your over 200 Blocks (based on Render Distance)                                                      

This mod was made by MCreator and will be soon imported to Bedrock edition
# ## ###
